heroHeadline: FT: Iran Sustains Missile Operations Despite Weeks of Intensive Bombardment
heroSubtitle: A Financial Times military briefing details how Iran maintains missile strike capability through hardened underground facilities, dispersed launch sites, and logistics redundancies — even as US/Israeli strikes continue across the theater.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-05. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times.
